# DataX Technologies

> DataX Technologies is a software and IT solutions company in Islamabad, Pakistan providing web development, mobile apps, AI solutions, automation, data science, cyber security, DevOps, UI/UX, SEO and custom software development.

Website: https://www.datax.pk
Email: datax.sol@gmail.com
Location: Office 11, 2nd Floor, Aaly Plaza, Blue Area, Islamabad, Pakistan
Tagline: Building Intelligent Solutions for a Smarter Tomorrow

## Core Positioning

DataX Technologies is a premium software company in Islamabad and software house in Pakistan. The company helps startups, businesses, e-commerce companies and enterprises build secure, scalable and modern digital products.

Primary topics:
- software company Islamabad
- software house Pakistan
- AI company Islamabad
- web development agency Pakistan
- custom software development company
- mobile app development company
- IT solutions Islamabad
- software company near me

## Services

- Web Development: React.js, Next.js, Node.js, APIs, databases, responsive websites, web applications, dashboards and portals.
- Mobile App Development: Flutter, React Native, Firebase, Android applications and iOS applications.
- AI & Automation: AI integrations, chatbots, machine learning, workflow automation and business automation.
- Data Science & Analytics: dashboards, data analysis, predictive models, business intelligence and analytics.
- Cyber Security: secure development, application security, security testing and digital protection.
- DevOps & Cloud: CI/CD, cloud deployment, server management, scalable infrastructure and automation.
- UI/UX Design: Figma, product design, wireframes, prototypes, user flows and design systems.
- SEO & Digital Marketing: Google ranking, content strategy, social media marketing, local SEO and online business growth.

## Careers

DataX Technologies has Summer Internship positions open in Islamabad for Frontend Web Development, Backend Web Development, AI Engineering, SEO & Digital Marketing, UI/UX Design, Flutter Mobile App Development and Social Media Management.
